use_cases: Displaying product or service features on landing pages
Showcasing key capabilities in a clean grid layout
Presenting value propositions with icons and descriptions
ai_summary: A features section component displaying product capabilities in a responsive grid layout with Lucide icons, titles, and descriptions. Clean minimalist design with bordered grid cells suitable for SaaS landing pages and product showcases. Features are organized in a 3-column desktop and 2-column mobile grid with consistent spacing and typography.
